control_plane_version_range.why: Only supported Kubernetes versions are permitted to keep the control plane consistent across the fleet.
control_plane_version_range.next_check: Inspect the kube-apiserver and kubelet versions before applying new workloads.

watched_releases.why: The observability stack is curated by the platform channel and must stay on a known chart.
watched_releases.next_check: Compare the Helm release version to the baseline manifest and reconcile if needed.

watched_releases.why: Critical services depend on the documented chart version to keep APIs stable.
watched_releases.next_check: Validate the Helm release version in each cluster against the platform manifest.

required_crd_families.why: Monitoring operators rely on these CRDs for alerting and dashboards.
required_crd_families.next_check: Ensure the CRD exists on every control plane and is in Active state.

required_crd_families.why: Database controllers expect this family to orchestrate storage bindings.
required_crd_families.next_check: Verify the CRD is present and at the expected storage version.
